Eddie Nketiah has received his first call-up to the England Under-21 squad for this summer's Toulon Tournament.

Holders England kick off the tournament on May 26 against China, before facing Mexico three days later. The Young Lions will wrap up the group stage with a June 1 clash against Qatar.

【now.com體育】運動服裝品牌「一剔牌」周四透露，儘管尼日利亞新波衫仍未推出，但公司已收到超過300萬張訂單。

運動服裝品牌「一剔牌」代表周四與尼日利亞足總人員在荷蘭阿姆斯特丹會面後，「一剔牌」透過機會向外公佈超霸鷹新球衣事宜，由他們設計的新球衣將會在5月29日公諸於世，他們更指出4周內已收到超過300萬張訂單。

「新超霸鷹波衫將會在2018年5月29日在全球市場發售，包括尼日利亞多間專門店，推出日期剛剛是他們準備出發往倫敦，與英格蘭進行友賽之前。單件球衣將售85美元。」尼日利亞足總副主席表示。

據報道指出，雙方3年前在倫敦簽下贊助合同，由於雙方均滿意合作關係，因此藉著今次會面商討了新合同的條款，相信金額將會進一步提升。雙方3年贊助合同期間，尼日利亞多支不同年齡的代表隊均取得好成績，當中包括大國腳殺入今夏俄羅斯世界盃決賽周，未知是否近績理想，波衫也格外受歡迎。

Arsenal full-back Hector Bellerin too expensive for Barcelona, says Guillem Balague

Sky Sports' Spanish football expert Guillem Balague answered your La Liga questions, and gave an update on Hector Bellerin's future.

TWITTER SAYS...

@AFahey_Official - #AskGuillem Hi Guillem just wanted to ask, is there a firm interest from Barcelona in Hector Bellerin and/or Aaron Ramsey, would a potential swap deal including Ousmane Dembele be possible ? Thank you.

GUILLEM SAYS...

"No, Hector Bellerin is too expensive. As I said they want a left-back and also a right-back but the Arsenal star is too expensive. As far as I know there is no interest from Barcelona in Aaron Ramsey.

"As for Dembele, as I said earlier, surprisingly enough Barca are considering loaning him out. At first they thought he’s advancing well but now they realise he needs to get minutes and he won’t if Antoine Griezmann arrives. They are waiting to see if Griezmann gets confirmed and if that’s the case they are looking at the possibility of letting him go on loan."
